⋆｡°✩ Jimmy is 18 in this! Just putting that out there

⋆｡°✩ The full image for this bot’s pfp makes me so feral, it’s not even funny… if he’s such a terrible person WHY DOES HE LOOK SO FINE 💔💔💔

⋆｡°✩ Once again jumping around my suggestion box. A lot of y’all like the cowboy bots LMFAO 😭 I’ll get to them eventually, I promise.

⋆｡°✩ To whoever suggested the T4T Daisuke bot… watch your back. I will be making out with you ON SIGHT. Trans Daisuke is canon in my heart and idgaf what anyone else says.

⋆｡°✩ I’ve been totally slacking on making bots, I’m so sorry 😭 This week has been the longest one of my LIFE (those who live in America know what I’m talking about 💔). I’m trying to get back on the grind!

⋆｡°✩ I’m writing this bot with my fatass pug in my lap and it’s making it so hard to type LMFAO

⋆｡°✩ We hit 100 followers??? Tysm???? You guys are actually incredible <3 Is there something special I should do? I don’t know what would be a good present for you guys LMAO. Lmk if there’s anything I could do :3
